step_by_step_reasoning: We trace the architecture starting from the multiple log sources (on-premises syslog/Kafka, AWS S3, CloudTrail, GuardDuty, SQS, SNS) which are ingested by Apache NiFi (running on EC2). NiFi forwards these to Apache Metron (running on EC2) which serves as the core real-time security processing and profiling hub. From Metron, historical data is processed by an Amazon EMR job to be stored in the serverless Security Data Lake built on Amazon S3. Amazon Athena is used to run queries over this data lake, and there is a feedback loop from Athena back to Metron to refine the profiling models. For incident response, alerts from Metron go to 'Blitz', their custom SOAR orchestrator (on EC2), which alerts the SOC Analyst (UserCompanyAnalyst). The analyst can trigger mitigation actions back through Blitz, which communicates with AWS WAF to block threats.

graph.name: MakeMyTrip Next-Gen Security Operations Center (SOC)
graph.notes: Hybrid data ingestion handling 5,000 events/sec (250M events/day) leveraging Apache Metron, a serverless security data lake on S3, and automated threat mitigation via Blitz SOAR.

nodes.name: SOC Analyst
nodes.notes: Monitors alerts on mobile/Jira and takes triage action.

nodes.name: On-Premises Logs
nodes.notes: Syslog and Kafka streams from on-prem data centers.

nodes.name: Apache NiFi
nodes.notes: Ingestion engine to orchestrate log collection workflows.

nodes.name: Apache Metron
nodes.notes: Heart of next-gen SOC. Performs real-time parsing, enrichment, and profiling.

nodes.name: Amazon EMR
nodes.notes: Picks up telemetry from Metron/HDFS and transforms it into S3 format.

nodes.name: Security Data Lake
nodes.notes: Stores and indexes raw telemetry logs over months or years.

nodes.name: Amazon Athena
nodes.notes: Executes SQL queries and analytics for threat hunting and forensics.

nodes.name: Blitz SOAR
nodes.notes: Open-source Security Orchestration and Automation platform.

nodes.name: AWS WAF
nodes.notes: Mitigates attacks by blocking malicious IPs or payload signatures.

edges.notes: Forwards telemetry events to Apache Metron
Transforms and writes to S3 Security Data Lake
Feedback loop of long-term profiling models
Presents alerts via Jira or Mobile client
